message: Jake
Jennifer
Oh, detective, are you filming too?
Hello. That.
Thanks for earlier.
I snuck out for a bit, and I felt kinda bad about it. You’re not worried?
Ah, I’m not worried at all.
Not at all?
Right.
So you’re not worried.
Look.
Talk.
Listen.
Show.
Move.
System
Surroundings
About Meryl
About the filming
About Cindy
About Ginny
Ginnie's ring
To another place.
Save
Quit the game.
Amid the bustling atmosphere before the shoot, the staff are moving around busily.
The rich green of Central Park is right there. It really feels like an urban oasis.
Inside Central Park, surrounded by greenery, there’s an unusual crowd forming.
Are they perhaps tired?
looks uneasy.
Her hair is parted in the middle with plain clothes, just a gold necklace for accessories. Even so, she's exceptionally beautiful compared to other women.
Even though her long hair is just tied back, she looks...
I get a completely different impression. Can things really change this much?
Today, Meryl is here, and the shoot is busy.
With this, we can finally move forward smoothly.
Is that so? There still seem to be various problems.
Could it be that you're angry?
Why is that?
That shop, it’s your favorite, right? I ended up getting into that place.
If you became a regular at that shop, Ash might be overjoyed.
I don't think so.
But I'm sorry. I really wanted to see you.
I feel like I'm talking too much.
Now that she finally showed up, I think we can finally make progress on the shoot.
I feel like a weight has been lifted off my shoulders.
It’s good, right? It seems like the shoot will go well from now on.
Yeah.
For the time being, yes.
Meryl, has she said anything about me?
No, nothing in particular.
I hope that’s the case.
It seems like there’s some misunderstanding. Like that I like the director or something.
If by any chance you talk to Meryl, could you deny that? I really hate being misunderstood.
I think it’s better to say that directly.
I wish I could do that.
Thinking about her makes me a bit melancholic.
I think the side story will be fine since Meryl is here, but when will my interactions with Guy happen?
Guy.
Speaking of which, he was supposed to be the romantic partner, right?
Yeah. According to the original schedule, we should have been done shooting long ago.
But he’s not here, is he?
Actually, there was a part I was betting on for this movie. They said I’m selling my sex appeal.
That started being said because of my role in the previous movie, right?
Yeah. But I don’t want to be labeled like that.
That's why I was eager to be called a talented actor in this movie.
I just have to do what I can.
I heard about Cindy from the director, so I went to visit her.
But Gloria wouldn't let me see her.
Is it really that bad, Cindy?
You know, it makes you worried like that, right? So, I just wanted to take a quick look, but I was turned away at the door.
I'm good friends with Cindy.
I think of her like a real sister, so I'm really worried.
She'll definitely be back to work soon.
You've been stuttering for a while now; do you know something?
Uh, no, not at all!
Really? I hope that's the case.
I wonder if Cindy is really okay?
Do you happen to know a woman named Ginny?
Ginny? No, I don't know her.
Her real name is Annette Wheaton.
I've heard that name before. Did she say something?
Have you met her recently?
No. I don't think I've seen her in at least a year.
I guess it’s pointless to hide it, so I'll just say it, but I have unpleasant memories with her.
Unpleasant memories?
We look alike. And I had a guy I was dating before, but she ended up with him. That's all.
I wonder what she's doing now?
Do you recognize this ring?
Uh.
Mm.
It's not my style. Is it possibly for me?
No, it's not that.
I'm looking for the owner or the giver of this ring.
I see.
I'm sorry, but I can't help you.
I'm sorry, no matter how many times I see it, I don't remember it. Did you show it to Meryl? She loves flashy designs like this one.
I didn't say such a thing when I showed it to her.
Right.
Then I really don't understand.
I'm sorry, I can't be of any help.
※※※ This is a bug ※※※
